findings.message: Implementation is already complete. waveField.ts exists at src/visual/systems/waveField.ts and is registered in main.ts alongside ParticleField.

findings.detail: GeometrySystem interface matches plan: init(ctx, seed, params) and draw(ctx, frame) in src/visual/types.ts
ModeManager switching logic matches plan: seeded initial mode selection, 90-180s interval, cyclic switching on elapsed time in src/visual/modeManager.ts

WaveField implements all specified VisualParam mappings: bassEnergy scales amplitude (1 + bassEnergy * 3), trebleEnergy drives line width and alpha, cadence scales phase speed, pointerDisturbance warps waves locally, paletteHue/paletteSaturation set HSL colors with per-wave hueOffset
Audio pipeline is fully decoupled from geometry. renderLoop.ts polls analyser independently; mode switch in modeManager.ts only calls init() on the new GeometrySystem, no audio references
Quality tier mapping in main.ts: maxWaves is 8/14/20 for low/medium/high, enableShimmer reuses quality.enableSparkle
TypeScript compiles cleanly with no errors

findings.message: Plan step 3 mentions structureComplexity adding harmonic overtones to wave shapes, but the implementation uses a simpler single-frequency sine. This is a simplification, not a defect — the visual result is still distinct from ParticleField.

Plan step 3 mentions curveSoftness controlling bezier vs angular segments, but the implementation uses only lineTo. Given segment density (width/10 ≈ 40-200 segments), lines approximate curves smoothly. Acceptable trade-off for performance.

second_mode_implemented.evidence: WaveField in src/visual/systems/waveField.ts with distinct layered sine-wave rendering

both_modes_reuse_same_seed_and_audio.evidence: Both receive identical FrameState from renderLoop.ts containing shared seed, shared VisualParams (bassEnergy/trebleEnergy from single analyser pipeline)

mode_choice_based_on_seed_or_elapsed_tim.evidence: modeManager.ts selectInitialMode uses createPRNG(seed+':mode') for initial index; switches on elapsed >= nextSwitchAt with seeded 90-180s interval

mode_switch_does_not_break_playback.evidence: modeManager.ts switchMode only calls geometrySystem.init(); audio pipeline in renderLoop.ts is polled independently with no geometry coupling

risks_assessment.risk: Wave rendering performance on low-end devices
risks_assessment.note: maxWaves capped at 8 for low tier, shimmer disabled via enableShimmer flag
Both modes render on black background with full-frame clear; transition is clean cut. Fade would be polish, not required.

notes: Plan is accurate and well-structured. The implementation already exists and matches the plan. Two minor simplifications (no structureComplexity harmonics, no curveSoftness bezier toggle) are reasonable trade-offs that don't affect acceptance criteria. All four acceptance criteria pass.
